overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban street. The player crosses Eisenhower street and walks along a sidewalk past industrial buildings and neon-lit storefronts on a clear sunny day.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
ego begins crossing the street at the Eisenhower crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking from under the overpass structure and crossing the street at the green light

entered.detail: elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street
vertical traffic signal showing red then green
blue and yellow building with large number 12 signage
orange street sign reading 'Eisenhower'
white striped pedestrian crossing lines
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke in the distance
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under an elevated highway overpass with a red traffic light visible. As the light turns green, the camera crosses Eisenhower street, revealing industrial smokestacks in the distance and palm trees lining the road. The environment transitions from semi-covered to open as the crossing completes.

events.description: black sedan drives past on the street to the left
pedestrian wearing a face mask passes close by on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk with industrial buildings and smokestacks visible in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a jacket and face mask walks toward the camera and passes by on the right

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple buildings and smokestacks
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk with a green metal railing on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right. Industrial smokestacks dominate the background skyline. A black car passes on the street, and a pedestrian wearing a face mask walks past the camera on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront strip with neon signage

events.description: entering commercial area with bright signage and storefronts
passing red neon signs casting colored reflections on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts including a liquor store with bright red neon signage

entered.detail: large billboard advertisement for 'Tough Frontman' with yellow text
green and yellow storefront sign reading 'HOOCH HEAVEN'
bright red neon sign reading 'LIVERPUNCH BOOZE' above a store entrance
traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside storefronts
row of commercial shops with metal shutters and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial strip with storefronts on the right. Bright neon signs including 'Hooch Heaven' and 'Liverpunch Booze' illuminate the sidewalk with red light. The industrial complex remains visible in the background but buildings now line the right side creating a more enclosed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching intersection with advertisements

events.description: approaching traffic light at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the next intersection, passing various billboards and advertisements

entered.detail: large yellow billboard with 'MAXTAC' text and character artwork
green canvas awning over a storefront entrance
traffic signal at the upcoming intersection showing green
pedestrian crosswalk lines at the next intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the commercial sidewalk with large billboards including a prominent 'MAXTAC' advertisement on the right. The camera approaches a traffic light at the next intersection, with the industrial complex now further in the distance and new commercial buildings visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed highway overpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins beneath the concrete cover of an overpass, moving across Eisenhower street as a traffic light turns green to reveal distant industrial smokestacks and palm trees under a clear sky. As the camera reaches the sidewalk, the environment shifts to a gritty industrial corridor defined by a green metal railing and graffiti-covered walls, where a black car and a masked pedestrian pass by. The scene then opens into a commercial strip, where the open skyline is gradually enclosed by storefronts and the sidewalk is bathed in the red glow of neon signs for Hooch Heaven and Liverpunch Booze. Finally, the camera glides past large billboards and a prominent MAXTAC advertisement, approaching a new intersection as the industrial complex recedes into the distance.
